title: CopperExtra
description: Gives more items that are made of copper!
body:
This mod supports `3` loaders. Any file ending in `FAB` is a Fabric file. Any ending in `NEO` is a NeoForge file, and any ending in `FORGE` is a Forge file.

Sometimes there's not enough things made of copper... like a shield.. Well... That's where we come in! This mod brings more things made of copper!

## HOW IT WORKS
Take a normal Copper ingot, smelt it, making a Smooth Copper Ingot, then you can make things from this mod! Every recipe is the same as the normal vanilla recipe besides for its the Smooth Copper Ingot and not the normal Copper Ingot.

## WHAT WE ADDED
Smooth Copper Sword, Smooth Copper Slab, etc

## HOW TO INSTALL/DOWNLOAD
Use a client that can support Fabric, NeoForge, or Forge. Make sure you're on 1.21.8 for Fabric and NeoForge, but 1.20.1 for Forge. When you have it installed, download the latest version of this mod (make sure it is the right file, check above for tags). Put the file in your mods folder, then launch the game and enjoy!

## BUG REPORT/SUPPORT
We have a Discord server for you to get help, report bugs, suggest mods, and suggest things to be added into mods. You can join it on the sidebar of the mod.
